
func (s *Server) handlePageIndexGET(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sess, _, ok := s.auth(w, r)
	if !ok {
		return
	}

	if r.URL.Path != "/" {
		s.render404(w, r)
		return
	}

	dispatch := func(
		e1 testapp.EventFoo,
	) error {
		{
			j, err := json.Marshal(e1)
			if err != nil {
				return fmt.Errorf("marshaling EventFoo JSON: %w", err)
			}
			err = s.messageBroker.Publish(r.Context(), s.messageBrokerMetrics, EvSubjFoo, j)
			if err != nil {
				return fmt.Errorf("publishing subject %q: %w", EvSubjFoo, err)
			}
		}
		return nil
	}

	p := testapp.PageIndex{
	App: s.app,
}
	body, err := p.GET(r, sess, dispatch)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "handling PageIndex.GET", err)
		return
	}
	genericHead := s.app.Head(r)

	bodyAttrs := func(w http.ResponseWriter) {
		writeBodyAttrOnVisibilityChange(w)
	}

	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, sess, genericHead, nil, body, bodyAttrs,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering PageIndex", err)
		return
	}
}
